profiles.name: office-media-basic
profiles.purpose: Word, PowerPoint, PDF, and image inspection or text extraction in ordinary Codex projects.

packages.capability: Read and write PPTX slides and notes when supported.
Pure-Python PDF text extraction, split, merge, and metadata operations.
Image metadata, conversion, resizing, and verification.

profiles.promotion_note: Keep project-local until at least three verified successes across two projects.

profiles.name: pdf-layout-advanced
profiles.purpose: Advanced PDF layout extraction, rendering, page images, and annotation workflows.

packages.capability: High-performance PDF rendering, extraction, annotation, redaction, and conversion.

profiles.promotion_note: Treat as optional because it is larger and changes the PDF dependency surface.

profiles.name: document-markdown-ai
profiles.purpose: Convert mixed document formats to Markdown or JSON for knowledge and RAG workflows.

packages.capability: Convert common Office, PDF, image, and web formats to Markdown.
Structured document conversion for richer downstream AI pipelines.

profiles.promotion_note: Install only when the project needs this conversion depth; do not put heavy AI document stacks in the base by default.
